'''Thabit''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Thabit system/Legends|Thabit system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. Local [[Maiferri Tag]] was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] spy arrested and executed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] shortly before the suicide of [[Keth Beamis]].<ref name="GC6" />
